india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: COMEX gold, silver fall on rising crude, focus shifts to central bank meetings
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices fell on April 27 due to rising crude oil prices amid uncertainty over US-Iran peace talks, raising inflation fears. Major central banks are expected to maintain current interest rates, impacting gold's appeal as an inflation hedge.

india_trends.title: ICICI Pru Alternatives buys RMZ office assets in Bengaluru, Pune for Rs 2,600 crore
india_trends.summary: ICICI Prudential Alternatives has made a significant investment by purchasing two prestigious office buildings in Bengaluru and Pune for roughly Rs 2,600 crore, using funds from the ICICI Prudential Office Yield Optimiser Fund. Both properties are gems in India's commercial landscape, with EcoWorld

india_trends.title: NSE investor base hits 13 crore as retail participation accelerates
india_trends.summary: Younger investors now dominate, with nearly 40% below 30 years, while women account for about a quarter of participants

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex rebounded on broad-based buying led by pharma, IT, auto and metals. Volatility eased, while analysts signalled resistance ahead, suggesting a range-bound trend with stock-specific opportunities amid global uncertainty.

india_trends.title: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank profit jumps 28% on strong growth
india_trends.summary: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank reported a 28% rise in Q4 profit driven by strong business growth, higher income and improved margins. Advances and deposits grew steadily, while asset quality strengthened, reflecting robust operational performance and sustained expansion across lending and deposit segments

india_trends.title: Q4 Results Today Highlights: AU Small Finance Bank, CUB, Bajaj Housing, SBI Cards & TMB Q4 profit up, UltraTech con. profit rises, Nippon Life profit rises y-o-y, ATGL, Coal India announce Q4 results
india_trends.summary: Q4 Results Today, April 27, 2026, Highlights: catch highlights

india_trends.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft exclusivity, to offer AI models on Amazon, Google cloud platforms
india_trends.summary: Since the exclusivity is ending, Microsoft will no longer pay a revenue share on OpenAI products it resells on its cloud.

india_trends.title: Coal India Q4 Results: Profit rises 12% to Rs 10,908 crore; co declares Rs 5.25 dividend
india_trends.summary: Coal India reported a 12% rise in Q4 profit driven by better realizations and higher income, despite cost pressures. Margins improved, though volumes stayed flat. The company also announced a final dividend, while annual profit declined due to elevated expenses.

india_trends.title: Nippon Life India AMC net up 29% on higher income
india_trends.summary: The fund house has announced a dividend of ₹12.50 per equity shares

india_trends.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square IPO expected to raise $5 billion: Report
india_trends.summary: The ​U.S. initial ​public offering of Bill Ackman's investment management ​company and a closed-end fund is expected to raise about $5 billion, a source familiar with the ‌matter told ⁠Reuters ⁠on Monday.

india_trends.title: REAL Finance Blockchain Prepares for Upcoming TGE Following $25 Million Raised from Nimbus Capital
India's fertilizer subsidy may jump 20% as Hormuz crisis spikes prices
india_trends.summary: India's fertilizer subsidy stood at ₹1.86 trillion in the 2025-26 fiscal year (FY26), and was estimated at ₹1.71 trillion in the budget for the ongoing financial year. Mint reported on 2 March that India's fertilizer subsidy will go up amid the West Asian conflict.

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Varun Beverages and JSW Energy on Tuesday for gains up to 8%
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 rebounded, ending its losing streak amid broad-based buying led by pharma, IT and metals. Analysts see resistance ahead but recommend Varun Beverages and JSW Energy for potential upside on bullish technical indicators.

india_trends.title: RBI asks banks to report overseas rupee OTC derivative contracts to CCIL
india_trends.summary: In a move aimed at improving transparency in the derivatives market, the central bank has issued directions on 'Reporting Instructions for Authorised Dealer Category - I Banks'.

india_trends.title: NSE adds one crore unique investors in 7 months, base crosses 13 crore mark
india_trends.summary: National Stock Exchange crossed 13 crore investors, reflecting rapid retail participation growth driven by digital access, awareness and policy support. Expansion is broad-based across regions, with rising SIP inflows and diversification, signalling deeper market penetration and a more inclusive inv

india_trends.title: UltraTech Cement posts record FY26 profit amid rising costs, sees demand intact
india_trends.summary: The company reported a consolidated net profit of ₹8,165.64 crore for the year—crossing the ₹8,000 crore mark for the first time and rising 35.12% y-o-y—according to exchange filings, even as fuel and power expenses rose 6% and freight costs, 10%.

india_trends.title: Nifty Closes Above 24,000 as Indian Markets Rally Broadly Despite High Crude Oil Prices - UdaipurTimes.com
india_trends.summary: Nifty Closes Above 24,000 as Indian Markets Rally Broadly Despite High Crude Oil Prices    UdaipurTimes.com

india_trends.title: Coal India Q4 Results: Net profit jumps 11% YoY to ₹10,839 crore; declares final dividend of ₹5.25 per share
india_trends.summary: Coal India reported a consolidated net profit of ₹10,839 crore for Q4, exceeding market expectations and marking an 11.15% increase from ₹9,751 crore year-on-year. The profit also rose 51.4% sequentially from ₹7,157 crore in the previous quarter.

india_trends.title: Digital Public Infra initiatives may contribute 4 pc of GDP by 2030: NITI report
india_trends.summary: India's digital public infrastructure is already boosting the economy. A NITI Aayog report predicts this contribution could reach four percent of GDP by 2030. The report outlines a strategic roadmap for continued growth. This involves state-led initiatives and collaboration. The goal is to enable li

india_trends.title: Adani Total Gas Q4 Results: Cons PAT grows 9% YoY to Rs 168 crore; revenue up 17%
india_trends.summary: Adani Total Gas reported modest profit growth in Q4FY26, supported by higher volumes and revenue expansion. Rising gas costs and reduced APM allocation impacted margins, while the company maintained growth through calibrated pricing, diversified sourcing, and continued infrastructure expansion initi
